ques: If I start using Copilot Individual, how much US dollars will it cost per year and what features does it have?
answer: Copilot Individual (now "Copilot Pro") costs $10 USD/month = $120 USD per year. Features (everything in Free plus): access to Cloud agent and code review, unlimited code completion and next edit suggestions, access to 3rd-party agents (Claude Code & Codex), model selection, and $15 in monthly total credits; plus Free-tier perks like Copilot CLI and access to Haiku 4.5/GPT-5 mini.
